content:
✅ **All 7 documentation files have been created successfully.** Here's a summary:

### Files Created

| # | File | Size | Description |
|---|------|------|-------------|
| 1 | `d:\portfolio-draft\README.md` | ~8KB | Project overview with badges, features table, tech stack, quick start, full project tree, customization guides (data/commands/themes), deployment guides (Vercel/Netlify/GitHub Pages/Cloudflare), migration comparison table |
| 2 | `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\ARCHITECTURE.md` | ~10KB | Mermaid component diagram, sequence diagram (boot flow), island hydration strategy table, data flow diagrams (portfolio data + AI chatbot), terminal engine layered architecture, module dependency graph, CSS architecture with load order, build/bundle strategy |
| 3 | `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\CONTRIBUTING.md` | ~7KB | Setup instructions, dev workflow, commit conventions, TypeScript/React/CSS coding standards, ANSI color reference, file naming conventions, 5 architecture rules, feature addition checklists, PR template, documentation requirements |
| 4 | `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\MAINTENANCE.md` | ~8KB | Step-by-step recipes for: updating portfolio data, adding projects, adding commands (4-step walkthrough), adding themes, updating AI model/personality, changing boot sequence, updating neofetch, adding easter eggs, changing fonts, updating dependencies, deploying, troubleshooting guide |
| 5 | `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\TECH_DEBT.md` | ~8KB | 2 P0 items (API key exposure, input sanitization), 5 P1 items (no tests, duplicate types, no streaming, no arrow keys, no mobile), 6 P2 items (history persistence, loading state, skip boot, etc.), phased improvement roadmap, performance optimization table |
| 6 | `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\AGENTS.md` | ~8KB | Quick reference table, 8 critical rules, file map (edit frequency), common tasks with full code examples, TypeScript conventions, ANSI color reference table, 7 gotchas explained, "What NOT to Do" table, manual testing checklist |
| 7 | `d:\portfolio-draft\.gemini\skills\portfolio-maintenance\SKILL.md` | ~5KB | YAML frontmatter (name + description), architecture at a glance, critical rules, common task recipes (add command, add project, add theme, update AI, deploy), ANSI color reference, key gotchas, doc references |

### What I Read Before Writing
- All 10 source files in `src/terminal/` (config, types, themes, commands, filesystem, data, chatbot, neofetch, snake, easter)
- All 5 components (Terminal.tsx, BootOverlay.tsx, AudioBar.tsx, CRTScreen.astro, LaptopShell.astro)
- Page + layout (index.astro, Layout.astro)
- Config files (package.json, astro.config.mjs, tsconfig.json)
- Data files (portfolio.json, ezra_system.md)
- Legacy codebase structure (index.html, js/, css/)

All docs reference actual file paths, use mermaid diagrams, tables, and code examples. No commands were run.
